issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the current turn phase, not until end of turn
Duration should be 'DuringTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the current turn phase, not until end of turn
Second effect (KO with maxPower 5000) does not match card text — the card text only describes power reduction and power boost, with no KO effect. This effect should be removed entirely
